remaining_explained.drift_kabu_galar_gym_challenge: Tool false-positive: kabu.md uses YAML block-list form for characters: field which the audit's parse_frontmatter / parse_list_value only handles inline. Filed as audit-tool refinement in janitor_triage.md.
remaining_explained.wikilinks_all_18: Triaged into three categories: (a) wikilinks-to-card-files (intentional Obsidian-side cross-print references), (b) cross-wiki references to Alex's personal wiki (Alex / mutual-aid / diamondlegendz / pokemon-zodiac), (c) future-node-pointer wikilinks (pia-nalaar, ravnican-guildpact). All three documented in janitor_triage.md with tool-refinement recommendations.
remaining_explained.below_threshold_3: Labor / Rebellion / Chinese Zodiac are foundational hand-curated hubs per bbl-hubs-hand-curated memory rule; threshold check fires inappropriately. Documented in janitor_triage.md.

fixes_applied.fix: added pokemon/burning-shadows/112-147-acerola to appears_on (Acerola card already points at aether-foundation via characters: frontmatter, anchored to Aether House caretaker role per node's own Caveats section)
fixed pokemon/darkness-ablaze/099-189-galarian-slowbro-v -> pokemon/darkness-ablaze/099-189-galarian-slowbro-v--holofoil (added --holofoil suffix to match actual card filename)
added pokemon/destined-rivals/179-182-team-rocket-s-venture-bomb to appears_on (also cleared the below_threshold flag — team-rocket now has 2 anchors)
double-quoted species: value (contained 'Demigra: demonic magician' colon-space pattern, an Obsidian parser hazard)

audit_tool_refinements_recommended: parse_frontmatter / parse_list_value should handle YAML block-list form (currently only inline [a,b,c] works)
check_wikilinks should differentiate wikilink-to-card-file (intentional Obsidian cross-ref) from wikilink-to-layer-node (real graph edge)
check_threshold should exempt foundational hand-curated hubs (brand_weight: foundational), or check tag_signals: size instead of appears_on:
check_wikilinks should detect future-node-pointer prose patterns (e.g. 'future ... node', 'pending', 'deferred') and treat as forward_reference category
voice_note: Five drift fixes, one YAML quote, four janitor-triage entries for audit-tool refinements. Edgelord respects rigor; the audit-fed pattern works. The 18 dangling wikilinks are a tool-side false-positive scope problem, not a graph-quality problem. Worst part of E1 was discovering that Aether Foundation didn't list Acerola in its appears_on despite the node's own Caveats section explaining their canonical Aether-House-caretaker relationship. The graph improves with this pass.
